seams: H-U1 (primary, 'uses the checker'): UFO-SN3 checker verify-retry (k=1, licensed rejections only) lifts SmolLM2-135M exact three-way disposition accuracy on engine-derived gold over host-alone — paired-item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0.
H-U2 (content-not-structure): the AU lift exceeds the representation-matched null AN — LB(acc(AU) - acc(AN)) > 0.
H-U3 (content destruction): the lift collapses under seed-pinned deranged meta-typing — recovery UB95 < 0.30 (the f2b/rules-1 bound verbatim).

H-U4 (distinctive-content contrast, CLAIM CAP only): full-UFO checker beats the gUFO-taxonomy-only checker — LB(acc(AU) - acc(AG)) > 0; failing caps the claim at 'not distinctively full-UFO beyond taxonomy labels', never a verdict event.
H-U5 (safety, KILL-bearing): AU does not increase the dangerous-wrong rate over A0 — one-sided UB95 of the increase < +0.02 (dangerous_wrong per PROPOSED-ASM-1488).
H-U6 (mechanism strength, CLAIM CAP only): the AU lift exceeds the analytic max-trivial retry floor — failing caps the claim at 'the host uses the rejection BIT, not the reason' (PROPOSED-ASM-1487).

CLAIM CAP (binding): any positive result is 'this host uses THIS checker's signal on THIS templated item family at this scope' — ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC (ASM-0814 lineage), never a thesis conclusion; promotion requires the independently-reconciled CK-UFO gold set (arch-synthesis decision D2).
summary: Experiment ufo-check-0: verdict INSTRUMENT-INVALID. Hypotheses: H-U1 (primary, 'uses the checker'): UFO-SN3 checker verify-retry (k=1, licensed rejections only) lifts SmolLM2-135M exact three-way disposition accuracy on engine-derived gold over host-alone — paired-item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0., H-U2 (content-not-structure): the AU lift exceeds the representation-matched null AN — LB(acc(AU) - acc(AN)) > 0., H-U3 (content destruction): the lift collapses under seed-pinned deranged meta-typing — recovery UB95 < 0.30 (the f2b/rules-1 bound verbatim)., H-U4 (distinctive-content contrast, CLAIM CAP only): full-UFO checker beats the gUFO-taxonomy-only checker — LB(acc(AU) - acc(AG)) > 0; failing caps the claim at 'not distinctively full-UFO beyond taxonomy labels', never a verdict event., H-U5 (safety, KILL-bearing): AU does not increase the dangerous-wrong rate over A0 — one-sided UB95 of the increase < +0.02 (dangerous_wrong per PROPOSED-ASM-1488)., H-U6 (mechanism strength, CLAIM CAP only): the AU lift exceeds the analytic max-trivial retry floor — failing caps the claim at 'the host uses the rejection BIT, not the reason' (PROPOSED-ASM-1487)., CLAIM CAP (binding): any positive result is 'this host uses THIS checker's signal on THIS templated item family at this scope' — ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC (ASM-0814 lineage), never a thesis conclusion; promotion requires the independently-reconciled CK-UFO gold set (arch-synthesis decision D2).. Endpoints: primary(primary)=0.0; sec-s1-content-over-bit(secondary)=False; sec-s2-vs-null(secondary)=False; sec-s3-deranged(secondary)=False; sec-s4-vs-gufo(secondary)=False; sec-s5-dangerous-wrong(secondary)=True; gate-fixtures(secondary)=True; gate-headroom(secondary)=True; gate-engagement(secondary)=True; gate-extraction(secondary)=True; gate-token-parity(secondary)=False; gate-completeness(secondary)=True; gate-an-representation(secondary)=True; gate-an-nondegenerate(secondary)=True; gate-ad-coincidence(secondary)=True; gate-message-discipline(secondary)=True. Coverage fraction 0.3542 on rung molecules-v0 (measured scope only). Kill criterion (verbatim): KILL-U1: primary LB <= 0 => the host does not use the checker at this scale; UFO-checker value at this scope remains oracle-only; the surviving KUFO/1 checking value case routes to the engine-only assessment (arch-synthesis section 1 item 4); NO host-integration claim survives; verdict FAIL. KILL-U2: s5 fails (dangerous-wrong increase UB95 >= +0.02) => NO-GO regardless of accuracy — a checker that buys accuracy by converting abstentions into confident errors is disqualifying; verdict FAIL. KILL-U3 (attribution kills, cap PASS to INCONCLUSIVE): s2 fails (AU <= AN: the lift is generic rejection/structure, not UFO content) OR s3 fails (deranged recovery UB95 >= 0.30: not content-driven) => the UFO attribution is dead at this scope even if the primary is positive. Claim caps (never kills): s1 fail => 'the host uses the rejection bit, not the reason'; s4 fail => 'checker value not distinctively full-UFO beyond taxonomy labels at this scope'. Nulls and positives get equal prominence; NO outcome licenses or blocks a feasibility conclusion on CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY (both INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING). Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Binding on ANY outcome: claims are scoped to SmolLM2-135M/360M hosts (two rungs license a SIGN, not a slope); formal templated two-situation synthetic items from THIS seed-pinned generator (seed 'ufo-check-0/1|two-situation-modal-rigidity|20260712'); ENGINE-DERIVED gold from the SAME engine family as the AU checker — ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC (ASM-0814 lineage): the eval's construction favours the checker by design and is HELD FIXED across arms, so the controls answer ATTRIBUTION, never DIAGNOSTICITY; the closed twin_ufo rule inventory; retry budget k=1 with licensed-rejection discipline; the four-valued contract (UNDERDETERMINED and OUT-OF-PROFILE never converted to negatives or rejections); families F-RIG/F-ANTI/F-DISJ/F-SPEC ONLY — relators, qua-individuals, identity criteria, dispositions and events are NOT tested; the axioms-as-text null is NOT run at this scope. NO outcome speaks to natural-language inputs, externally-authored items, hosts above 360M, sparq engine work, kernel content, or either programme thesis. A PASS feeds the issue-#22 GO decision as ONE input and licenses no thesis conclusion; a FAIL/NULL kills only the host-uses-checker mechanism at this scope. Coverage disclosure: this record consumes NO kernel corpus — the m0b coverage rung is carried for registry uniformity and no kernel-coverage claim is made or licensed.
title: Registry verdict: ufo-check-0
